title: CatBoost correction with full original data in every fold
summary: Train CatBoost on competition fold plus all original rows while validating on competition rows.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep RealMLP core unchanged. For CatBoost only, train on each competition training fold plus all original data, and validate only on the held-out competition fold. Keep blend weight fixed.
expected_effect: Use maximum data for CatBoost while maintaining competition-only validation.
risk: Full original data can shift CatBoost ranking away from public test distribution.
